sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("=== CURRENT ===")
for r in range(35, 55):
    print(f"{r:2d}: {ascii_lines[r][26:50]}")

# Rotate to face LEFT (red blocks on RIGHT side at cols 44-46)
# Currently faces DOWN, need to rotate to face LEFT
# Let's try 2x SPACE to face UP, then 1x SPACE to face LEFT
# Or try 1x SPACE to see direction
result = action(['SPACE', 'SPACE', 'SPACE'])
print("\nAfter 3x SPACE:", result['state'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['pixels'] < 100 or n['color'] != 'S':
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== AFTER 3x SPACE ===")
for r in range(29, 55):
    print(f"{r:2d}: {ascii_lines[r][26:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
